comments: David Coverdale of Whitesnake comes in and has a chat with Tommy Vance
Tommy Vance chats with Ozzy Osbourne via the telephone
File a has sporadic radio frequency interruptions in the first half of this recording. It  is an incomplete episode with bits missing and mixed at the end with different shows.
Files b, c & d were recorded by Hal C F Astell and are the complete show including the midnight news.
Tracks marked * are not on file a
